title: rhacoma pallens
intro: Rhacoma pallens, also known as Rauwolfia pallens, is a plant species native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Rhacoma pallens include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive disorders, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve sleep quality. Rhacoma pallens can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine.
